subject: Site Walkthrough
description: 2 hours fixed. On-site measurements, photos, scope documentation.

subject: Project Management
description: 4 hrs (2 on refresh). Material ordering, scheduling, coordination.

subject: Building Permit
description: Fixed $350 cost / $500 price. Bozeman building permit for remodeling.

subject: Floor Tile
description: Demolition of floor tile finishes. Craftsman: 0.08 mh/SF (Sm crew). Refresh uses 0.5x.

subject: General
description: Studs/plates 16" oc, adjusted for remodel context. 0.05 mh/SF. Refresh: 4 hrs fixed.

subject: Niche Blocking
description: 2 hours per niche. Frame blocking for recessed shower niches.

subject: Install Shower Trim
description: Remove existing fixtures and replace each fixture with a new fixture: sink faucet, toilet supply, shower, tub.

subject: Install Toilet
description: Replace existing toilet with new toilet, includes all material needed.

subject: Vanity Faucet Assembly
description: Faucet, P-trap, supply lines, angle stops. $85 cost.

subject: Exhaust Fan
description: 3 hours fixed. Install exhaust fan, duct to exterior, wire to switch.
